concept.description: Annotates production Java types with stable report metadata for public dead-code analysis.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR type.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' OR type.fqn =~ 'src\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName SET type:SaltMarcher:ProductionType, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN sourceFileName = '' OR type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + sourceFileName END RETURN type AS ProductionType

concept.description: Labels top-level public concrete production types that belong to the public dead-code candidate surface.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ProductionType) WHERE NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND type.visibility = 'public' AND type.synthetic IS NULL AND ( type:Java:Type:Enum OR type:Java:Type:Record OR ( type:Java:Type:Class AND type.abstract IS NULL ) ) SET type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeCandidateType RETURN type AS PublicDeadCodeCandidateType

concept.description: Labels methods declared by production types so reachability stays inside the repo-owned method graph.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ProductionType)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method) SET method:SaltMarcher:ProductionMethod, method.ownerRelativePath = type.relativePath RETURN method AS ProductionMethod

concept.description: Labels structural runtime entry types that keep public concrete production types live.
concept.cypher:
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeCandidateType)-[:IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(shellContributionApi:Java:Type) WHERE shellContributionApi.fqn = 'shell.api.ShellContribution' AND type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(leftbartabs|statetabs|dropdowns)\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+Contribution' SET type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootType RETURN type AS PublicDeadCodeRootType
UNION
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeCandidateType)-[:IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(serviceContributionApi:Java:Type) WHERE serviceContributionApi.fqn = 'shell.api.ServiceContribution' AND type.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ServiceContribution' SET type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootType RETURN type AS PublicDeadCodeRootType
UNION
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeCandidateType)-[:EXTENDS*0..]->(frameworkType:Java:Type) WHERE frameworkType.fqn IN ['javafx.application.Application', 'javafx.application.Preloader'] SET type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootType RETURN type AS PublicDeadCodeRootType

concept.description: Labels structural runtime entry methods and constructors that must stay live.
concept.cypher:
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootType)-[:DECLARES]->(constructor:Java:Method:Constructor) WHERE constructor.visibility = 'public' SET constructor:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootMethod RETURN constructor AS PublicDeadCodeRootMethod
UNION
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootType)-[:EXTENDS*0..]->(frameworkType:Java:Type) MATCH (type)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method) WHERE frameworkType.fqn IN ['javafx.application.Application', 'javafx.application.Preloader'] AND method.name IN ['main', 'start', 'init', 'stop', 'handleApplicationNotification', 'handleStateChangeNotification'] SET method:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootMethod RETURN method AS PublicDeadCodeRootMethod

concept.description: Labels candidate public concrete types that are reachable from structural runtime roots.
concept.cypher: MATCH (candidate:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeCandidateType) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH path = (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootType)-[:DEPENDS_ON|EXTENDS|IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(candidate) WHERE all(typeNode IN nodes(path) WHERE typeNode:SaltMarcher:ProductionType) } SET candidate:SaltMarcher:LivePublicDeadCodeType RETURN candidate AS LivePublicDeadCodeType

constraint.description: Public top-level concrete production types must be reachable from structural runtime roots.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (candidate:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeCandidateType) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH path = (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootType)-[:DEPENDS_ON|EXTENDS|IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(candidate) WHERE all(typeNode IN nodes(path) WHERE typeNode:SaltMarcher:ProductionType) } RETURN candidate.relativePath AS Source, candidate.fqn AS Type, 'reachable from bootstrap, JavaFX, or reflective contribution roots' AS ExpectedUsage, 'no reachable production dependency path from any structural runtime root' AS ActualUsage, 'Delete the type, narrow its visibility, or model its runtime root structurally if it is intentionally live.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Type

constraint.description: Public methods on live public concrete production types must be reachable from structural runtime entry methods.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LivePublicDeadCodeType)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:ProductionMethod) WHERE method.visibility = 'public' AND method.synthetic IS NULL AND method.abstract IS NULL AND NOT method:Java:Method:Constructor AND NOT method:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootMethod AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH path = (:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:PublicDeadCodeRootMethod)-[:INVOKES|VIRTUAL_INVOKES*1..]->(method) WHERE all(methodNode IN nodes(path) WHERE methodNode:SaltMarcher:ProductionMethod) } RETURN type.relativePath AS Source, type.fqn AS Type, method.signature AS MemberSignature, 'reachable from bootstrap, JavaFX, or reflective contribution entry methods' AS ExpectedUsage, 'no reachable invocation path from any structural runtime root method' AS ActualUsage, 'Delete the method, narrow its visibility, or model its runtime root structurally if it is intentionally live.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, MemberSignature
